questions: lithium ion battery kivabe kaj kore?
battery technology te ki notun ase?
answers: Battery technology involves designing and improving devices that store electrical energy chemically. Lithium-ion batteries dominate today, but solid-state and sodium-ion batteries are emerging.
Battery technology holo energy store korar device develop kora. Lithium-ion battery phone, laptop, EV sobkichutei use hoy. Solid-state battery next big thing hote pare.
Modern batteries work through electrochemical reactions between an anode, cathode, and electrolyte. Research focuses on increasing energy density, reducing charging time, and improving safety.
Battery tech is evolving fast — solid-state batteries promise more energy in less space, sodium-ion offers cheaper alternatives, and recycling technology is improving to handle battery waste.
